finding: No valid raw-versus-ContextGuard token comparison can be published because codex exec did not dispatch any configured lifecycle hooks.

rejected_samples.reason: The optimized trial recorded zero PreToolUse invocations and zero compacted outputs.
The current CLI accepted --dangerously-bypass-hook-trust but still recorded zero PreToolUse invocations and zero compacted outputs.

independent_probe.configuration: Trusted project, hooks feature enabled, valid hooks.json and inline TOML variants, installed ContextGuard plugin, and --dangerously-bypass-hook-trust.
independent_probe.result: Neither marker-only PreToolUse nor Stop hooks executed during codex exec.

implemented_fixes: Use PostToolUse decision=block feedback instead of unsupported replacementOutput.
Recognize python -m pytest, ruff, and mypy validation commands.
Use the current nested hook configuration schema.
Reject benchmark runs unless hooks are observed and at least one output is compacted.
